channel.title: LLM Timeline — Shanghai AI Laboratory/SenseTime Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Shanghai AI Laboratory/SenseTime.

image.title: LLM Timeline — Shanghai AI Laboratory/SenseTime Models

item.title: Intern-S1-Pro (Shanghai AI Laboratory/SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: Intern-S1-Pro License: open Type: model 1000TA22B. Assumes base model of Qwen3. "Built upon a 235B MoE language model and a 6B Vision encoder, Intern-S1 has been further pretrained on 5 trillion tokens of multimodal data"

item.title: Intern-S1 (Shanghai AI Laboratory/SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: Intern-S1 License: open Type: model 41T tokens assumes base model of Qwen3. "Built upon a 235B MoE language model and a 6B Vision encoder, Intern-S1 has been further pretrained on 5 trillion tokens of multimodal data"

item.title: OREAL-32B (Shanghai AI Laboratory/SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: OREAL-32B License: open Type: model OREAL=Outcome REwArd-based reinforcement Learning.

item.title: InternLM3 (Shanghai AI Laboratory/SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: InternLM3 License: open Type: model "InternLM3 is trained on only 4 trillion high-quality tokens, saving more than 75% of the training cost compared to other LLMs of similar scale." Playground: https://internlm-chat.intern-ai.org.cn/

item.title: InternVL 2.5 (Shanghai AI Laboratory/SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: InternVL 2.5 License: open Type: model Benchmarks are estimates based on Qwen2.5 72B Instruct as the base LLM (InternVL 2.5=InternViT-6B-448px-V2.5 5.5B + Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct). "Notably, Qwen2-VL processed a cumulative total of 1.4T tokens, while our InternVL2.5-78B is trained on just ∼120B tokens [of vision]."Dataset... we identify repetitive generation as one of the most detrimental issues. In many open-source or synthetic datasets, a small number of repetitive samples—comprising merely thousands of examples in our Stage 2 data mixture—can cause the model to spiral into repetitive loops, particularly in long-form outputs or CoT reasoning tasks. This phenomenon undermines the effectiveness of test-time scaling strategies. To address this challenge and support future research, we designed an efficient data filtering pipeline to remove low-quality samples, thereby minimizing the risk of repetitive generation." Repo: https://github.com/OpenGVLab/InternVL

item.title: InternLM2.5 (Shanghai AI Laboratory/SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: InternLM2.5 License: open Type: model "The release of InternLM2.5 series contains 7B model size for now and we are going to release the 1.8B and 20B versions soon" [20B released around 1/Aug/2024]

item.title: InternLM2 (Shanghai AI Laboratory/SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: InternLM2 License: open Type: model

item.title: InternLM (Shanghai AI Laboratory/SenseTime)
item.description: Parameters: InternLM License: closed Type: model Outperforms ChatGPT, LLaMA on RACE-h, Chinese + English
